qf-99.title: Norway–England: the Northern clash against the Three Lions
qf-99.angle: Haaland against Bellingham and Kane: power, rhythm and composure.
body: Norway–England is a quarter-final between two football cultures that understand rhythm, duels and pressure.
Norway arrives with the momentum of knocking out Brazil, powered by Haaland’s double.
England survived Mexico 3–2 and now has to prove that talent can become tournament maturity.

qf-100.title: Argentina–Switzerland: Messi against the Swiss wall
qf-100.angle: A quarter-final between Messi’s last dance and Switzerland’s cold discipline.
body: Argentina bring genius, emotion and big-match memory. Switzerland bring structure, patience and the ability to survive tight games.
Argentina’s comeback against Egypt showed mental strength, but also defensive fragility in transition. Switzerland will try to turn the match into a controlled, nervous arm wrestle.
One detail may decide it: a set piece, one Messi touch, or Swiss clarity in the final minutes.
